title: Earthy Flaky Chuck Roast Crumble
description: A low-fat-friendly monsoon Brazilian dish featuring tender chuck roast layered with a savory crumble that complements the meat beautifully.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Season chuck roast with salt and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add onions, garlic, cumin seeds, and coriander powder; sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Transfer the mixture to an oven-safe dish. Top with broccoli florets and sprinkle with all-purpose flour.
Pour coconut milk over the vegetables, ensuring they are fully covered. Stir well to combine.
Place the dish in the preheated oven and bake for about 30 minutes or until vegetables are tender and meat is cooked through (internal temperature should reach at least 145°F).
Serve hot as a side dish with rice or quinoa.
